name: Health Wedges
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a slice of bread (buttered side down) onto the sandwich maker.
2. Spread bread with peanut butter.
3. Sprinkle celery and cheese over the peanut butter.
4. Top with a slice of bread (buttered side up).
5. Lower the lid, latch the sandwich maker shut, and toast for 2-3 minutes or until done.
